summary: Iteration 20 verifies Echtzeit-SSE FMS push, FmsAlertSidebarPanel real-time appearance, shared state between header bell and sidebar panel, helfer-readonly behavior, and Divera auto-position (lat/lng update + 0/0 plausibility skip). All 9 specified scenarios PASS. Backend 4/4 pytest green, Frontend 6/6 playwright assertions green.
critical_code_review_comments: services/divera.py.sync_incident uses 'from core.db import db' and 'from services.fms_audit import record_fms_change' — both bind module-level names at import time, which complicates mock-based tests (workaround in test_realtime_sse_fms.py: patch divera_module.db AND fms_audit_module.db). Not a runtime defect.
useFmsAlerts EventSource (line 125) connects to API_BASE/incidents/stream WITHOUT credentials/headers, OK for current public preview but ensure auth-token handling is added when auth is introduced.
useFmsAlerts beep interval (5s) does NOT reset when soundOn toggles — interval keeps running but inner check 'if(!soundOn)return' silences it. Minor: leaves orphan interval until unmount; acceptable.
FmsAlertSidebarPanel shows max-h-[280px] scrollable list — good for high alert volume. Pulse animation overlay uses pointer-events-none — no click blocking.
Real-time SSE measurement: PATCH→panel render was 0.53s (well under 2s spec). Polling-Fallback (10s) is additive and harmless.
test_credentials: N/A — localStorage els-role + els-active-incident bypass active in preview build (iter19 confirmed).
seed_data_creation: None persistent. Test triggered transient FMS-5 events on resource KTW 1 (2508ce07-...) in MANV-Uebung Sued (ad55e8cd-...) and acked them. Final state: fms_status=2, all alerts acknowledged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSE realtime + Sidebar-Panel + Divera-Auto-Position complete. Tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_realtime_sse_fms.py — pytest 4/4. UI selectors: fms-alert-sidebar-panel (root), fms-alert-sidebar-list, fms-alert-sidebar-item-<eventId>, fms-alert-sidebar-ack-<eventId>, fms-alert-sidebar-sound. Header bell unchanged (fms-alert-bell, fms-alert-badge). Both consume useFmsAlerts hook → singleton-like shared state confirmed (ack in one removes from both). Helfer-role: panel still rendered (read-only) with 'Quittierung nur durch EL/FA' subtitle and disabled Quittieren buttons. SSE-Push measured at ~0.5s. IMPORTANT for next agent: setting role/active-incident via page.evaluate(localStorage.setItem) AFTER page load does NOT propagate to React state (useRole reads on mount). Always use page.add_init_script BEFORE goto.
